summary: Backend testing completed for pillar request submissions and products endpoints. 18/19 tests passed (1 skipped). Verified: 1) Advisory request submission works with service desk ticket creation, 2) Emergency request submission works with service desk ticket creation, 3) All 6 pillar products endpoints return data from unified_products collection, 4) Breed variations are accepted in requests (shihtzu, shih tzu, golden retriever, etc.)

advisory_request_submission.details: POST /api/advisory/request creates request with ID starting with ADV- and creates service desk ticket. Tested with multiple advisory types: behaviour, nutrition, senior_care, new_pet, health, training.

emergency_request_submission.details: POST /api/emergency/request creates request with ID starting with EMRG- and creates service desk ticket. Tested with multiple emergency types: medical_emergency, injury, poisoning, lost_pet, found_pet.

advisory_products.details: GET /api/advisory/products returns 6 products from unified_products collection with pillar='advisory'.

emergency_products.details: GET /api/emergency/products returns 6 products from unified_products collection with pillar='emergency'.

enjoy_products.details: GET /api/enjoy/products returns 3 products from unified_products collection.

farewell_products.details: GET /api/farewell/products returns 12 products from unified_products collection with pillar='farewell'.

fit_products.details: GET /api/fit/products returns 6 products from unified_products collection with pillar='fit'.

learn_products.details: GET /api/learn/products returns 6 products from unified_products collection with pillar='learn'.

breed_normalization.details: Frontend petAvatar.js has BREED_VARIATIONS mapping that normalizes: shihtzu->shih tzu, goldenretriever->golden retriever, etc. BREED_PHOTOS has matching photo URLs for normalized breeds.

service_desk_integration.details: Both advisory and emergency requests create service desk tickets with proper ticket_id returned in response.

critical_code_review_comments: All pillar products endpoints correctly query unified_products collection as expected.
Breed normalization is implemented in frontend petAvatar.js utility - handles common misspellings like shihtzu, goldenretriever, etc.
Service desk integration is working for both advisory and emergency request submissions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pillar request submissions (advisory, emergency) work correctly with service desk ticket creation. All 6 pillar products endpoints (advisory, emergency, enjoy, farewell, fit, learn) return products from unified_products collection. Breed normalization is handled in frontend petAvatar.js utility with BREED_VARIATIONS mapping.

verified_fixes.advisory_request_submission: VERIFIED - POST /api/advisory/request works with service desk integration
verified_fixes.emergency_request_submission: VERIFIED - POST /api/emergency/request works with service desk integration
verified_fixes.pillar_products_unified: VERIFIED - All 6 pillar products endpoints query unified_products collection
verified_fixes.breed_normalization: VERIFIED - Frontend petAvatar.js normalizes breed spellings (shihtzu->shih tzu, etc.)
